Package ui.tooltip

Interface Tippable

All Known Implementing Classes:
Absorber, Adder, Arithmetic, Card, Changer, Combinator, Conveyor, Delay, Direction, Divider, Duplicator, Entrance, Exit, FlipFlop, GameTile, Material, MaterialSetter, Merger, Modifier, Mover, Multiplier, ParityFilter, Pathway, RedBlackFilter, Setter, Splitter, Subtractor, Suit, SuitSetter, ValueSetter, Vaporizer
public interface Tippable
The Tippable interface should be implemented by any object that can provide a Tooltip for display.
